title: cystium boiseanum
intro: Cystium boiseanum, also known as Boise cystidium or Cystidium boiseanum, is a type of fungus that belongs to the family Cystidiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and antifungal activities, as well as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cystium boiseanum are said to include immune system support, wound healing, and potential anti-cancer properties, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, Cystium boiseanum is often combined with other plants to create topical creams, ointments, and tinctures for various health applications.
